implementation_log: Created src/tw_quant/selection/pipeline.py with SelectionConfig (slots dataclass), private helper _compute_weighted_score, pure functions filter_signals/rank_signals/select_top, stub implementations WeightedRankingModel and ConfiguredSelector, and SelectionPipeline wiring them together. Modified src/tw_quant/selection/__init__.py to re-export SelectionPipeline and SelectionConfig alongside the existing RankingModel and Selector protocol exports. Created tests/test_tw_quant_selection_contracts.py with exactly 17 test methods covering pipeline contracts, filter/rank/select unit tests, and protocol conformance tests. Updated tests/test_tw_quant_scaffold_imports.py to add src.tw_quant.selection.pipeline to MODULES list and test_tw_quant_t12_exports_verify_all_symbols test.
test_execution_summary: Ran pytest: 20 passed in 0.18s. 17 test_tw_quant_selection_contracts.py tests + 3 test_tw_quant_scaffold_imports.py tests (including 2 T12-specific).
summary: T12 implementation COMPLETE. Three-stage filter->rank->select pipeline implemented. All anti-spillover constraints met. No backtest, exit-rule, or reporting logic introduced.
